# Berninox - the sustainable Swiss toothbrush

We respect your privacy

Berninox uses cookies, including third-party cookies, for operational purposes, statistical analysis, and to personalise your experience, in order to offer you targeted content tailored to your interests and to analyse the performance of our advertising campaigns. You may accept these cookies by clicking “Accept” or click “Preferences” to manage your cookie settings. [Learn more](https://berninox.com/en/policies/privacy-policy)

Preferences Accept

✕

Manage consent preferences

[Deny all](https://berninox.com/)[Accept all](https://berninox.com/)

We use cookies to optimize website functionality, analyze the performance, and provide personalized experience to you. Some cookies are essential to make the website operate and function correctly. Those cookies cannot be disabled. In this window you can manage your preference of cookies.

Strictly necessary cookies

Always allowed

These cookies are essential in order to enable you to move around the website and use its features, such as accessing secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

[Cookies details](javascript:void(0))

*   Name keep_alive Provider Shopify Domain berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used when international domain redirection is enabled to determine if a request is the first one of a session.
*   Name secure_customer_sig Provider Shopify Domain berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to identify a user after they sign into a shop as a customer so they do not need to log in again.
*   Name _cmp_a Provider Shopify Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 24 hours Purpose Used for managing customer privacy settings.
*   Name cart_currency Provider Shopify Domain berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 14 days Purpose Used after a checkout is completed to initialize a new empty cart with the same currency as the one just used.
*   Name localization Provider Shopify Domain berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to localize the cart to the correct country.
*   Name _secure_session_id Provider Shopify Domain berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 24 hours Purpose Used in connection with navigation through a storefront.

Functional cookies

- [x]  

These cookies enable the site to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

[Cookies details](javascript:void(0))

Performance cookies

- [x]  

These cookies enable us to monitor and improve the performance of our website. For example, they allow us to count visits, identify traffic sources and see which parts of the site are most popular.

[Cookies details](javascript:void(0))

*   Name _s Provider Shopify Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Shopify analytics.
*   Name _shopify_y Provider Shopify Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Shopify analytics.
*   Name _orig_referrer Provider Shopify Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 14 days Purpose Allows merchant to identify where people are visiting them from.
*   Name _landing_page Provider Shopify Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 14 days Purpose Capture the landing page of visitor when they come from other sites.
*   Name __cf_bm Provider CloudFlare Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used to manage incoming traffic that matches criteria associated with bots.
*   Name __cf_bm Provider CloudFlare Domain.cdn.shopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used to manage incoming traffic that matches criteria associated with bots.
*   Name _shopify_sa_p Provider Shopify Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Capture the landing page of visitor when they come from other sites to support marketing analytics.
*   Name _shopify_sa_t Provider Shopify Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Capture the landing page of visitor when they come from other sites to support marketing analytics.
*   Name _shopify_s Provider Shopify Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used to identify a given browser session/shop combination. Duration is 30 minute rolling expiry of last use.
*   Name _y Provider Shopify Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Shopify analytics.
*   Name _ga_BE0S005V64 Provider Google Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Cookie is set by Google Analytics with unknown functionality
*   Name _ga Provider Google Domain.berninox.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Cookie is set by Google Analytics with unknown functionality
*   Name __cf_bm Provider CloudFlare Domain.productreviews.shopifycdn.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used to manage incoming traffic that matches criteria associated with bots.

Targeting cookies

- [x]  

These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

[Cookies details](javascript:void(0))
